title: The Unwanted Undead Adventurer
sourceNotes: Single 12-episode season (ONA). Manga ongoing (current ch. 70); AniList does not track chapter counts for this series so figures are sourced from tracking sites. Anime-continuation guides agree the season covers manga chapters 1-29, with readers directed to pick the manga back up at ch. 30. No widely-documented named-arc split exists for the adapted stretch beyond the Bronze-Class Exam and Garden Labyrinth story beats named in the anime's own episode titles, so the intervening groupings below are approximate.
